1862860.name: StreamAlertsTV
1862860.description:
Introduction

Your Twitch interactions appear on top of any game through a transparent overlay, designed to playfully disrupt your content and boost Bits income. From Birthday POV to spooky Lights Out! streams, get fresh ideas that make your short clips go viral, and turn any game you play into a whole new challenge.

Twitch, and all major broadcast tools, including OBS.

StreamAlertsTV works with Twitch follows, subs, Bits, raids, chat commands, channel points, and including charity integrations.

Twitch Extension

Easily display the options to disrupt the game with Bits in the extension StreamAlertsTV. We see creators increase their Bits income by x7 times. Viewers love the fact it's more disruptive than a sound alert, and works with any game.

Customize

Go ham. Fully customize your alerts through our bundles, effects, animations, spawn rate and timing to match your style, and make long streaks with loyal viewers extra chaotic, unique, and worth celebrating.

How Does It Work?

StreamAlertsTV is a transparent game on top of the one you are playing. So whether you are Just Chatting or playing Fortnite, these alerts will selfishly make their way into your field of view. This could mean disruption on the stream by throwing a smoke bomb! It certainly makes that final boss more challenging, and entertaining!

What makes it unique?

You don't have to glance away to your second screen and check who interacted; you already know because it has appeared right on top of your gameplay. This means your audience can jump in at any moment to disrupt, distract, or challenge you, all without pulling your eyes off the action. Embrace the chaos and remember, you’re in control.

Alerts

Give your objects amusing physics, behavior, and lots of cool shit! Make an alert that stands out, celebrates your loyal viewers uniquely by increasing the amount of objects. This way it immediately shows their support, instead of just showing the same banner.

Games

Let your audience troll with prompt a fun game for you to play mid-focus..hehehe.. they can change your point of view, lose your mouse, and a lot more! All games are free, and we continuously provide new content. You can support our team by purchasing a bundle, or activating the extension.

An alert system to help you stand out!

Nearly every Twitch Streamer has a form of animated notification for new followers, subscribers, donations, etc. The problem? Monotony. Our approach to managing this issue was to utilize a game engine, ensuring each alert is unique and expressive for loyal viewers.

Fresh content

You can play the game your stream is known for, but with the playful disruptions, every session becomes a new challenge for you and a new kind of experience for your viewers.

Clippable content 🎬

The disruptions evoke authentic reactions. Yes, lots of that might be swearing, but this is the kind of content that makes your clips share-worthy and perfect for short-form content. More laughs, more surprises, and more moments your viewers want to watch, all while boosting your earnings and discovery.

A must try: Lights Out!

Viewers turn the lights out at the. worst. possible. time. Your screen goes entirely to black with only your mouse illuminating a small area. Use it, and hurry! Find the switch! 

*** StreamAlertsTV requires a Twitch Account! ***
